    add-migration <configuration> <migration>

v1.0.0.0
USAGE:
    Lynx.Manager.dll update-db <configuration> <connection_string> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <configuration>        Path to the context configuration file used for this 
                           command                                              
    <connection_string>    Connection String to the database that overrides     
                           configuration                                        

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information                           
    -d, --dry-run    Executes the command without changing the database
    -v, --verbose    Executes the command with more logged information
